title: Drop In
description: A modpack with the aim of being a drop-in replacement for Vanilla minecraft.
body: # Drop In ![Affiliate](https://i.imgur.com/1O8Piaf.png)\ A modpack with the aim of being a drop-in replacement for Vanilla minecraft, in a similar way to OptiFine. Drop In significantly enhances the performance of the game (including the stuttering), adds almost all of OptiFine's features, fixes some aspects of the game (bugs, for example), and makes some things overall prettier! ### Features - Almost all of OptiFine's features (CIT, capes, zoom, etc...) - Stuttering highly dampened - FPS significantly increased - Loading times / memory usage significantly decreased - Blink-and-you'll-miss-it fast chunk generation - Network performance increased - Shader support (Drop In comes pre-installed with [Miniature Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/miniature-shader) as an optional low-impact shader) - Highly customizable LAN that can be shared to anyone inside/outside your network - Bug fixes / General fixes - Dynamic Lights - Bushy Leaves (that are highly performant - the performance impact is negligible) - Some aspects have been prettied up (leaves / animations) ### Upcoming features: - Huge performance increase on Nvdia GPUs (thanks to Nvidium) - Perfect biome blend with no performance impact (using something like [Better Biome Reblend](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbrb)) [Mod list](https://modrinth.com/modpack/drop-in/version/ALPHA-1) Basically, the aim of this is to have a drop-in (hence the name) replacement for vanilla minecraft that keeps the game like it is now, while simply trying to fixing all of it's shortcomings.
